summary: Extend model-router _applyLearningPenalties to incorporate meta-KB signals — warnings reduce score (capped 0.25), positive evidence provides bonus (capped 0.1)
root_cause: Model-router scoring did not factor in meta-KB anti-pattern signals from the learning engine
fix_approach: Added meta-KB warning penalty and evidence bonus logic after existing risk score penalty in _applyLearningPenalties; 6 tests verifying penalty math and caps

validation.notes: Penalties are additive to existing learning penalties; fail-open when no meta-KB signals present
